# awscc_lambda_microvm_image (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::Lambda::MicrovmImage



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `additional_os_capabilities` (Set of String)
- `base_image_arn` (String) ARN of the base MicroVM image.
- `base_image_version` (String) Specific version of the base MicroVM image to use.
- `build_role_arn` (String) ARN of the IAM build role.
- `code_artifact` (Attributes) Code artifact for the active MicroVM image. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--code_artifact))
- `cpu_configurations` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cpu_configurations))
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the MicroVM image was created.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the MicroVM image and its purpose.
- `egress_network_connectors` (Set of String)
- `environment_variables` (Attributes Set) Environment variables to set in the container during the snapshot build. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--environment_variables))
- `hooks` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hooks))
- `image_arn` (String) ARN of the MicroVM image.
- `latest_active_image_version` (String) The latest active version of the MicroVM image.
- `latest_failed_image_version` (String) The latest failed version of the MicroVM image.
- `logging` (Attributes) Configuration for MicroVM image logging. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--logging))
- `name` (String) Unique name for the MicroVM image within the account.
- `resources` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources))
- `state` (String) Current state of the MicroVM image.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Key-value pairs to associate with the MicroVM image for organization and management. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the MicroVM image was updated.

- `port` (Number)
